name: middleleap-ai-dlc
description: MiddleLeap AI DLC — downloadable content for AI-enabled development: skills, agents, and workflows for regulated software delivery.

plugins.name: middleleap-ai-sdlc
plugins.description: Practices and patterns for AI-enabled software development — CLAUDE.md authoring, a starter context template, and a structured code-review agent.

plugins.name: middleleap-open-finance
plugins.description: UAE Open Finance domain expertise — CBUAE regulation and Standards errata tracking, Al Tareq platform integration, AlTareq brand and CX requirements, Islamic banking (Shariah-compliant finance), a virtual Head-of-Risk reviewer, and value-proposition prototyping.

plugins.name: middleleap-brand
plugins.description: MiddleLeap brand and design system — tokens, the Pivot logo rules, component recipes, voice and copy rules, and a WCAG AA gate. Use when building or reviewing any MiddleLeap interface, document, or marketing asset.

plugins.name: middleleap-loom
plugins.description: The Loom — MiddleLeap's method for building regulated software with AI: a gated discovery harness, an autonomous delivery loop with human four-eyes merge, always-on guardrails, and the machinery to adopt it in any repository. Proven end-to-end on a UAE Open Finance back office.
